title: Transparency World Border
description: This resource pack makes world borders completely invisible.And the red vignette too.
body:
This resource pack makes the world border and the red vignette that appears when you approach the world borders completely invisible.
See in curseforge![https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/transparency-world-border](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/transparency-world-border)
